purpose: Result-blind license-first triage of the frozen candidate ledger before expensive source, solution, evaluator, and instruction review.
terminal_status_note: This artifact changes screening order only. Repository metadata and default-branch file presence never mutate candidate decisions or inclusion-rule values; exact pre-solution revision artifacts remain mandatory for pass or terminal exclusion.

method.first_stage: Reuse the frozen repository-level probe across source pools and classify file-only signals without changing candidate status.
method.second_stage: Resolve linked solution and exact pre-solution base only for license-priority rows, then inspect LICENSE, LICENCE, COPYING, NOTICE, UNLICENSE, manifests, and README at that pinned revision.
method.terminal_boundary: Only exact-revision-license-confirmed or exact-revision-no-license-basis evidence may change license_or_use_basis or trigger license-or-use-basis-unavailable.
method.nonterminal_boundary: classifier, default-branch file presence, none-observed, and not-probed are priority signals only.

known_limitations: The frozen license probe covers repository metadata or default-branch root-file presence, not candidate revisions.
A file-only signal does not identify license type and may resolve to copyleft, source-available, all-rights-reserved, or no grant.
A none-observed signal is not proof that the exact candidate revision lacks a license declaration in a manifest, README, or non-root path.
The SWE-bench Multilingual dataset card license does not establish the upstream repository license at each of 300 exact base revisions.
This artifact observes no agent result and does not change the 60-task quotas, inclusion rules, or candidate decisions.
